home.howWillYouUse: How will you be using the app today?
home.wantToAdoptDesc: Take a short quiz and our AI will match you with dogs that fit your lifestyle. No account needed.
home.shelterVolunteerDesc: Manage dogs, add photos, link your shelter, and use AI to build ideal adopter profiles for each dog.
home.findPerfectDogDesc: Answer a few questions about your lifestyle and our AI will match you with dogs available for adoption. No account needed — your data stays on your device.
home.tellAboutYourselfDesc: Your home, lifestyle, experience, and what you're looking for.
home.aiFindsMatchesDesc: Our AI scores compatibility between your profile and available dogs.
home.exportResultsDesc: Print or save your match report to take to any shelter.
home.volunteerPortalDesc: Manage dogs in your shelter, run AI assessments to build ideal adopter profiles, and share listings.
home.aiAssessmentDesc: Enter a dog's profile and get an AI-generated ideal adopter match — instantly.
home.photosListingsDesc: Post dogs with photos, temperament notes, and shelter links.
home.shelterLinkingDesc: Link your account to your shelter so adopters can find your dogs.

login.title: Happy Adoptions AI
login.subtitle: Sign in to save your matches and profile.
login.expiredLink: This link has expired. Request a new one.
login.sentLink: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. It expires in 1 hour.
login.noPasswordNeeded: No password needed. We'll email you a one-click sign-in link.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Check your connection and try again.

dogFacts: Dogs have been human companions for over 15,000 years.
A dog's sense of smell is 10,000x stronger than a human's.
Every dog's nose print is unique — like a fingerprint.
Dogs can understand up to 250 words and gestures.
Dogs dream just like we do.
The Basenji is the only dog breed that doesn't bark.
quiz.aiAnalysing: Our AI is analysing compatibility right now.
quiz.matchingAgainstShelter: Matching against dogs from this shelter

contact.title: Let's get started
contact.intro: Tell us a little about yourself so we can personalise your experience. Everything is optional — fill in what you're comfortable with.
contact.emailHelper: Shelters can contact you about your matches.
contact.anythingElsePlaceholder: Any extra info about your home, schedule, or what you're looking for...

household.title: Tell us about your household
household.subtitle: Who lives at home with you?

housing.title: Your home
housing.subtitle: Help us understand your living space.
housing.allergies: Someone at home has dog allergies

lifestyle.title: Your lifestyle
lifestyle.subtitle: How do you spend your days?
lifestyle.homeAllDay: Work from home / stay at home
lifestyle.hoursAlone: Hours dog would be alone per day
lifestyle.dogWalker: Will use a dog walker or doggy daycare

experience.title: Your experience with dogs
experience.subtitle: Helps us find a dog that fits your confidence level.
experience.previousDogs: How many dogs have you owned before?
experience.specialNeeds: Open to dogs with special needs

preferences.title: Dog preferences
preferences.subtitle: Any preferences? We'll factor these in but won't limit your matches.
preferences.goodWithDogs: Must be good with other dogs
preferences.referencePhoto: Have a dog in mind? Upload a photo (optional)
preferences.referencePhotoDesc: We'll use AI to find visually similar dogs in our listings.

results.couldntGenerate: We couldn't generate your matches. Try again.
results.rankedByCompatibility: Ranked by compatibility with your profile
results.noDogsMatched: No dogs matched your criteria right now.
results.basedOnPhoto: Based on the photo you uploaded

assess.pageDescription: Enter this dog's profile and our AI will generate an ideal adopter description — perfect for screening applicants and writing adoption listings.
assess.signInDescription: Volunteer accounts let you save assessments, post dogs, and link to your shelter.
assess.name: Name
assess.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe this dog's personality, background, known trauma, behaviour at the shelter...
assess.specialNeeds: Has special needs or medical requirements

postDog.signInRequired: Sign in to post a dog
postDog.signInDescription: You need an account to list a dog for adoption.
postDog.pageDescription: List your dog independently — no shelter required.
postDog.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell adopters about this dog's personality, history, and needs...
postDog.photosDescription: Add up to 6 photos. Clear photos increase adoption chances significantly.
postDog.validationRequired: Name, sex, and contact email are required

dogDetail.interestedIn: Interested in {name}? Reach out to the owner directly.
dogDetail.notSure: Not sure if {name} is right for you?

dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.noProfileDesc: Take the quiz to build your adopter profile and get matched with dogs.
dashboard.noFavorites: No saved dogs yet. Browse listings and save the ones you like.
dashboard.noListings: You haven't posted any dogs yet.

shelters.pageDescription: Shelters connected to Happy Adoptions. Start the quiz linked to a specific shelter to match against their dogs.
shelters.noSheltersDesc: Shelters register through Happy Shelter AI. You can still use the quiz to get matched with independent listings.

email.subject: Your Happy Adoptions sign-in link
email.heading: Happy Adoptions AI
email.body: Click the button below to sign in. This link expires in 1 hour.
email.ignore: If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.
